title: helmia cuspidata
intro: Hemia cuspidata is a species of plant that belongs to the family of Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus or rue family, and is native to Madagascar. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. Hemia cuspidata has been shown to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
